mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT p.permission_code FROM sys_permission p INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rp.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.account_id = #{accountId} AND p.status = 1 AND p.is_deleted = 0

SELECT DISTINCT p.permission_code FROM sys_permission p INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rp.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.account_id = #{accountId} AND p.resource_type = #{resourceType} AND p.status = 1 AND p.is_deleted = 0
